The new text lacks the heavy drop shadow seen previously.

The view zooms out to display a centered block of orange-brown serif text with dark drop shadows against the green background. The text reads "Danse ultra débutante", "32T, 2 murs", "Musique: I'll settle for Ireland (Derek Ryan)", and "Chorégraphe: Don Pascual".

summary.text: [0-4] Partial brownish-gold serif text zooms out to reveal "Ireland forever" in orange-brown with drop shadows on green. The view cuts to close-up yellowish-green fragments reading "l settle" and "erek Ry". [4-10] The camera pulls back to show centered orange-brown text: "Danse ultra débutante", "32T, 2 murs", "Musique: I'll settle for Ireland (Derek Ryan)", and "Chorégraphe: Don Pascual". The text stays static then fades to faint yellowish-green. [10-14] The scene shifts to an empty room with light wood flooring, white walls, and dark timber beams framing windows. A radiator sits left, a cabinet right. Finally, a person in dark clothing enters from the right side.

[14-16] A person wearing a black cowboy hat, black t-shirt with a white logo on the back, blue jeans, and dark boots walks from the right towards a cabinet. [16-20] They turn to face the camera and stand still, placing their right hand on their hip. [20-22] They raise their left hand to the hat brim while crossing the left leg over the right ankle. [22-26] Uncrossing legs, they step the left foot out, swing the left arm outward, then bring the hand to the chest. [26-28] Finally, they raise both hands to the upper chest with bent elbows, then lower arms and bring feet together.

[28-30] Individual in black cowboy hat/blue jeans crosses left leg over right, clasps hands near upper chest. [30-32] Uncrosses legs to stand apart, lowers hands to rest palms on hips; wearing black t-shirt. [32-34] Leans forward, points index fingers at feet on light wood floor. [34-36] Returns hands to hips, crosses left leg over right. [36-38] Uncrosses legs to stand feet apart, hands on hips. [38-40] Pivots away from camera to face windows, revealing black t-shirt with white back logo. [40-42] Facing windows, raises right hand to touch hat brim, left hand on hip, legs slightly crossed.

A person in a black cowboy hat, black t-shirt with a white back logo, blue jeans, and dark boots faces timber-framed windows. They lower their right hand from the hat brim to their hip, joining the left hand. Legs uncross slightly, settling feet apart on the light wooden floor. Shifting weight onto the left leg, they move the right foot back, lift the right heel, and bend the right knee, lifting the foot behind the left ankle. Both hands remain near the hips. The person places the right foot down flat on the floor. Hands remain near hips while wearing blue jeans and dark boots. They stabilize the stance with back to the camera, maintaining a static position with feet planted shoulder-width apart on the light wooden floor, facing the windows.

[56-58] A person in a black cowboy hat, black t-shirt with a white back logo, blue jeans, and dark boots stands facing timber-framed windows, hands on hips. [58-60] They turn right to a profile view, hands dropping to sides. [60-62] Rotating to face the camera, a chest graphic becomes visible as arms rest near hips. [62-64] The individual extends arms outward, widening their stance while transitioning from a raised finger gesture. [64-66] Turning from a left profile to front, they uncross legs and hold arms straight out. [66-68] Hands come together at the chest while stepping slightly. [68-70] Hands lower, and the left leg crosses over the right. [70-72] They maintain a static forward-facing pose with hands on hips and legs crossed.

A person wearing a black cowboy hat, black t-shirt, blue jeans, and dark boots stands on a light wooden floor. From [72-74], they uncross their legs, stepping the left foot out to the side into a wide stance with both hands resting on their hips. Between [74-78], they transition by crossing their left leg over their right leg at the ankles and maintain this stationary stance facing forward. At [78-80], they uncross their legs, shifting to a stance with the left foot forward. Finally, from [80-86], they cross their left leg over their right leg again and hold this static pose with hands resting on their hips, facing the camera without significant movement.

An individual in a black cowboy hat, black t-shirt with a white back logo, blue jeans, and dark boots stands on a light wooden floor.
